data.body: Eval research + adversarially-reviewed plan complete. Findings: rebar's eval architecture already matches 2025-26 community two-tier consensus (deterministic gate every PR via eval-discipline job; LLM-judge tier off-PR-path via eval-live, manual-only, non-blocking; pass@k banned; at_least(k)+coverage; cross-family pinned judge reports-not-gates; kappa gold-set adoption). BUT the live tier is an unwired stub: run_eval() raises NotImplementedError, scorer names are inert strings (NO registry executes them), eval-live promptfoo step is a placeholder echo. The 3 uncovered reviewers (completion-verifier/ticket-quality/spec-alignment) are store+repo-coupled agentic ops -> need context-injection solver + tool stubs + fixtures, NOT inline prose. USER DECISIONS: (1) eval scope = FULL Phase1+2 (build scorer engine + live harness so evals truly gate all 7 specs); (2) WS-VISUAL-EVAL = split into its own epic, out of scope for 6f2d. Plan saved at job tmp eval-implementation-plan.md.
